interactions.stageContent: {"headline":"Accelerate Your Sales Proposal Workflow","callToAction":"Schedule a 30-minute demo to see AtlusDeck generate a proposal for one of your current opportunities in real time.","sections":[{"sectionName":"The Challenge","sectionPurpose":"Problem statement","headlines":["How Meridian Dynamics Can Close Deals Faster with AI-Powered Automation"],"bodyParagraphs":["Your sales team spends 5-7 business days assembling proposals for each new opportunity. Meanwhile, competitors with faster turnaround are winning deals that should be yours. Manual proposal creation doesn't scale -- every new opportunity competes for the same limited bandwidth."],"metrics":[{"value":"5-7 days","label":"Current turnaround"},{"value":"40+","label":"Active deals competing for bandwidth"}],"bulletPoints":["Proposals delayed by manual assembly","Competitor speed advantage on new opportunities","Limited bandwidth constrains pipeline coverage"],"speakerNotes":"Emphasize the cost of slow turnaround in lost deals."},{"sectionName":"Our Solution","sectionPurpose":"Product overview","headlines":["AI-Powered Proposal Generation in Under 2 Hours"],"bodyParagraphs":["AtlusDeck's AI-powered platform generates complete, brand-compliant proposal documents in under 2 hours. From first-contact pagers to full capability decks, every deliverable is personalized to your prospect's industry and pain points using your approved templates and messaging."],"bulletPoints":["Brand-compliant documents from approved templates","Personalized to prospect industry and pain points","Full proposal suite: pagers, capability decks, and more"],"speakerNotes":"Highlight the personalization and brand compliance aspects."},{"sectionName":"Why It Matters","sectionPurpose":"Value metrics","headlines":["Measurable Impact on Your Sales Pipeline"],"bodyParagraphs":["Reduce proposal turnaround by 95%. Increase prospect engagement rates by 20%. Scale your proposal capacity 4x without adding headcount. Every document maintains brand consistency and reflects your latest positioning."],"metrics":[{"value":"95%","label":"Turnaround reduction"},{"value":"20%","label":"Engagement rate lift"},{"value":"4x","label":"Proposal capacity increase"}],"bulletPoints":["No additional headcount required","Automatic brand consistency enforcement","Always reflects latest company positioning"],"speakerNotes":"Lead with the 95% turnaround reduction -- it's the most compelling metric."},{"sectionName":"Next Steps","sectionPurpose":"Call to action","headlines":["See It in Action"],"bodyParagraphs":["Schedule a 30-minute demo to see AtlusDeck generate a proposal for one of your current opportunities in real time."],"bulletPoints":["Live demo with your real deal data","30 minutes to see full workflow"],"speakerNotes":"Offer to use one of their actual current opportunities for the demo."}]}
